name: presentation-structure
tagline: Documents the HTML slide format, journey-bar level system, navigation, and renumbering rules for presentation/index.html.
verdict: Clean, focused reference doc: concrete HTML patterns, a clear level-transition table, and actionable renumbering rules. Weak on dispatch: the description states what it knows but never when to use it, and there is no negative-trigger guidance to avoid misfiring against the sibling styling/framework skills. No versioning signal.

highlights.summary: description (line 3) states what the skill knows but never says when an agent should invoke it.
No exclusions or 'NOT for' guidance; could misfire against presentation-styling or vibe-to-agentic-framework skills.
No version field, changelog, or dated revision notes present.
